subcodes.first_line: O Nayyir! Praise be to God that from every direction the traces of thy deeds are made manifest. The sun of utterance beareth witness, and the moon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نیر الحمد لله آثار اعمال شما از هر شطری ظاهر آفتاب بیان گواهی داده و ماه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @the power of words; of speech, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
